positive.title: Hate Crime Legislation Strengthened
positive.description: Government committed to making anti-LGBTQ+ hate crimes aggravated offences with tougher sentences, putting them on equal footing with racial and religious hate crimes.
positive.impact: Enhanced legal protections and deterrent effect

positive.title: Gender Clinic Waiting List Support Pilot
positive.description: £125,000 pilot providing mental health and wellbeing support for adults waiting for gender services (some wait 8+ years)
positive.impact: Addresses mental health crisis during long waits

positive.title: Adult Gender Services Review
positive.description: NHS commissioned independent review (Levy Review) into operation and delivery of adult gender dysphoria clinics
positive.impact: Potential for service improvements, though concerns about scope

positive.title: Conversion Therapy Ban Promised
positive.description: Reaffirmed commitment to full trans-inclusive ban on conversion therapy in King's Speech
positive.impact: Not yet implemented - draft bill not published after 15+ months

negative.title: Permanent Puberty Blockers Ban
negative.description: Health Secretary Wes Streeting made temporary ban permanent for under-18s outside clinical trials
negative.impact: Restricts access to treatment, criticized by LGBT+ Labour and medical organizations

negative.title: Endorsement of Supreme Court Ruling
negative.description: PM Starmer welcomed ruling defining "sex" as biological sex, reversing previous position that "trans women are women"
negative.impact: Enables exclusion of trans people from single-sex spaces

negative.title: Position Shifts on Trans Women
negative.description: Starmer's spokesperson stated PM no longer believes "trans women are women", reversing 2022 position
negative.impact: Perceived as abandoning trans community, internal party dissent

delayed_or_stalled.title: Gender Recognition Reform
delayed_or_stalled.description: Pledged to "modernise and simplify" GRC process, but no legislation introduced
delayed_or_stalled.impact: No change to current system requiring medical diagnosis

delayed_or_stalled.title: Conversion Therapy Ban
delayed_or_stalled.description: Draft bill promised but not published 15+ months after King's Speech
delayed_or_stalled.impact: Conversion therapy remains legal despite repeated promises

delayed_or_stalled.title: Single-Sex Spaces Guidance
delayed_or_stalled.description: Minister Bridget Phillipson has not approved EHRC's 300-page code of practice on single-sex spaces
delayed_or_stalled.impact: Organizations continue using potentially unlawful guidance; creates uncertainty

external_context.title: Supreme Court Ruling
external_context.description: Court ruled "sex" in Equality Act means biological sex, not gender identity (Not a government action)
external_context.impact: Major legal shift enabling exclusion from single-sex spaces

external_context.title: NHS Cass Review Implementation
external_context.description: NHS England began implementing Cass Review recommendations on children's gender services
external_context.impact: Closure of Tavistock, opening of regional centers, restricted treatments

mental_health.note: Over half considered suicide in past year, with trans/non-binary youth at significantly higher rates
Rate more than double that of cisgender peers

mental_health.metric: Trans adults who have attempted suicide
mental_health.note: At least once in their lives (Stonewall data)

mental_health.metric: Trans people who have considered suicide
mental_health.note: With many reporting repeated thoughts of self-harm

mental_health.metric: Trans youth facing discrimination who considered suicide

trust_institutions.metric: Trans people trust in judges/legal system

healthcare_access.metric: NHS gender clinic waiting times (South West)
healthcare_access.note: Over 5,000 people waiting for first appointment

healthcare_access.metric: NHS gender clinic waiting times (Northern region)
healthcare_access.note: Person at top of waiting list (as of July 2025)

healthcare_access.metric: Trans people waiting more than third of adult life
healthcare_access.note: To get first NHS gender clinic appointment

manifesto_commitments.timeline: Draft bill not published 15+ months after King's Speech

manifesto_commitments.promise: Make hate crime against LGBTQ+ people aggravated offence
manifesto_commitments.timeline: Committed in Crime Bill June 2025, awaiting final passage

internal_tensions: LGBT+ Labour expressed "deep concerns" at puberty blocker ban
32 Labour MPs wrote to EHRC concerned about proposed single-sex guidance
LGBT+ Labour "deeply disappointed" by Supreme Court endorsement
Gender-critical Labour members welcomed puberty blocker ban
Bridget Phillipson facing pressure from both sides on single-sex guidance
